title: Beat into Shape
description: Deal 5 damage. [gold]Forge[/gold] based on attacks made to this enemy this turn. [gold]Forge[/gold] an additional 5 for each attack.
upgraded_description: Deal 7 damage. [gold]Forge[/gold] based on attacks made to this enemy this turn. [gold]Forge[/gold] an additional 7 for each attack.
notes: CalculatedForge scales with the number of powered attacks made to the target this turn. The card's actual Forge mechanic involves CalculationBase (upgraded value) as a multiplier and CalculationExtra adjustment per hit from this card.
